title: Docs Viewer Roadmap
content_html:
Docs Viewer Roadmap

suggested order feature status depends on outcome
1 Recent shipped — show recent additions for catalogue-like Moments and recent edits for changing document collections
2 External Asset Collections ready — inventory user-owned local project files without turning them into documents
3 Control Surfaces shipped — give controls a consistent definition, host, state, and action model
4 Local Tree Move Projection ready — update the local index after a committed move without a full refresh
5 Index Multiple Selection proposed Control Surfaces; Local Tree Move Projection add explicit checkbox selection and group movement
6 Document Visualisations proposed — support build-rendered D2 diagrams in authored documentation
7 Semantic Reference Authoring proposed — improve semantic-reference authoring when a bounded need becomes important
8 Copy Subtree To Scope shipped — create an independent copy of one parent and its descendants in another existing scope
9 Button Placement proposed Control Surfaces place controls by the user's object of action and promote Open in VS Code to the document toolbar
10 Dated Export Snapshots proposed — retain small browseable snapshots outside Docs Viewer without creating an archive scope
